历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest ranking for the science group was approximately 4749 → 4432 → 4592 → 3934 → 4596, with fluctuations but no clear unidirectional trend; the 2025 baseline is about 4596; the university's planned enrollment in the science group in Qinghai Province was 5 in 2021, 4 in 2022–2023, and 2 in 2024–2025; the 2026 plan increases to 4, a 100% expansion compared to 2025 (absolute number from 2 to 4), with a very large expansion rate, significantly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; on the Soft Science main ranking, it was approximately 180th in 2025 and rose to about 177th in 2026, with a stable upward trend; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving a volleyball match controversy, which has limited impact on science candidates' application psychology; Douyin popularity ranks 18th overall (high heat), with high attention among sports universities; Beijing Sport University has sports science as its absolute ace (A+), but the science group mainly enrolls in majors such as Rehabilitation Physical Therapy, Sports Human Science, Sports Rehabilitation, and Sports Economics and Management, which are somewhat related to the core discipline of sports science, with rehabilitation majors benefiting from the aging population trend.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Rehabilitation Physical Therapy/Sports Rehabilitation belong to the medical technology category, with high social popularity (aging population + health awareness); Sports Economics and Management belongs to the management category, with average popularity; the total number of candidates in Qinghai Province in 2026 is about 48,000 (uncertain mark), estimated at about 30,720 based on the recent physics category proportion of about 64%, roughly the same as the 30,457 in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 ranking of 4596, the 2026 plan expanding from 2 to 4 (100% expansion), the stable number of candidates, and the high popularity of rehabilitation majors, it is expected that the lowest ranking for the science group in 2026 will significantly shift backward (ranking number increases), with a predicted lowest ranking of about 7404, in the range of 6904–7904.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group was approximately 1949 → 1472 → 1293 → 1420 → 1097, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (ranking numbers decreasing, competition intensifying); the 2025 baseline is about 1097, the highest level in the past five years; the enrollment plan for the liberal arts group in Qinghai Province was 7 in 2021, 6 in 2022, and 4 from 2023 to 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 6, a 50% expansion compared to 2025, which theoretically eases competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; on the Soft Science main ranking, it was approximately 180th in 2025 and rises to about 177th in 2026, with a stable upward trend; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving fan interference controversy in the CUVA volleyball finals, which has limited impact on the psychology of regular cultural exam candidates; Douyin popularity ranks 18th overall (high heat), with high attention on short video platforms, reflecting the continuous exposure of sports institutions; Beijing Sport University's absolute strength is in sports science (fifth-round discipline evaluation: sports science A+), but the liberal arts group enrollment majors in Qinghai Province are mainly non-sports liberal arts majors such as Journalism, Network and New Media, English, and Public Affairs Management, which have low correlation with the school's core advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of journalism and communication majors continues to be 'clearly discouraged' (Zhang Xuefeng effect + employment pressure), foreign language majors are 'generally wait-and-see', and public management majors are 'clearly discouraged'; the total number of examinees in Qinghai Province in 2026 is about 48,000 (uncertain mark), estimated at about 17,280 based on the recent history category proportion of about 36%, which is basically unchanged from 17,212 in 2025, with no significant change in examinee scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the 2025 ranking of 1097 is the highest in recent years (most intense competition), the 50% expansion in 2026 eases competition, the examinee scale is stable, and the social popularity of enrollment majors such as journalism and communication is low, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group in 2026 will slightly shift backward (ranking number increases), with a predicted minimum ranking of about 1456, and a range of 1092–1820.
